mapper.sql: select id, device_id, name, manufacturer, model, firmware, transport, stream_mode, on_line, register_time, keepalive_time, ip, create_time, update_time, port, expires, subscribe_cycle_for_catalog, subscribe_cycle_for_mobile_position, mobile_position_submission_interval, subscribe_cycle_for_alarm, host_address, charset, ssrc_check, geo_coord_sys, media_server_id, custom_name, sdp_ip, local_ip, password, as_message_channel, heart_beat_interval, heart_beat_count, position_capability, broadcast_push_after_ack, server_id from gb_device
mapper.insert: insert into gb_device ( device_id, name, manufacturer, model, firmware, transport, stream_mode, on_line, register_time, keepalive_time, ip, create_time, update_time, port, expires, subscribe_cycle_for_catalog, subscribe_cycle_for_mobile_position, mobile_position_submission_interval, subscribe_cycle_for_alarm, host_address, charset, ssrc_check, geo_coord_sys, media_server_id, custom_name, sdp_ip, local_ip, password, as_message_channel, heart_beat_interval, heart_beat_count, position_capability, broadcast_push_after_ack, server_id ) values ( #{deviceId}, #{name}, #{manufacturer}, #{model}, #{firmware}, #{transport}, #{streamMode}, #{onLine}, #{registerTime}, #{keepaliveTime}, #{ip}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{port}, #{expires}, #{subscribeCycleForCatalog}, #{subscribeCycleForMobilePosition}, #{mobilePositionSubmissionInterval}, #{subscribeCycleForAlarm}, #{hostAddress}, #{charset}, #{ssrcCheck}, #{geoCoordSys}, #{mediaServerId}, #{customName}, #{sdpIp}, #{localIp}, #{password}, #{asMessageChannel}, #{heartBeatInterval}, #{heartBeatCount}, #{positionCapability}, #{broadcastPushAfterAck}, #{serverId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = values(name), manufacturer = values(manufacturer), model = values(model), firmware = values(firmware), transport = values(transport), stream_mode = values(stream_mode), on_line = values(on_line), register_time = values(register_time), keepalive_time = values(keepalive_time), ip = values(ip), update_time = values(update_time), port = values(port), expires = values(expires), subscribe_cycle_for_catalog = values(subscribe_cycle_for_catalog), subscribe_cycle_for_mobile_position = values(subscribe_cycle_for_mobile_position), mobile_position_submission_interval = values(mobile_position_submission_interval), subscribe_cycle_for_alarm = values(subscribe_cycle_for_alarm), host_address = values(host_address), charset = values(charset), ssrc_check = values(ssrc_check), geo_coord_sys = values(geo_coord_sys), media_server_id = values(media_server_id), custom_name = values(custom_name), sdp_ip = values(sdp_ip), local_ip = values(local_ip), password = values(password), as_message_channel = values(as_message_channel), heart_beat_interval = values(heart_beat_interval), heart_beat_count = values(heart_beat_count), position_capability = values(position_capability), broadcast_push_after_ack = values(broadcast_push_after_ack), server_id = values(server_id)
mapper.update: update gb_device set on_line = #{onLine} where device_id = #{deviceId}
